prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MYLAREB1310-50PK Product Type: BLANKET Brand (from catalog): Mylar Existing Title: Mylar Emergency Survival Sleeping Blanket - 50 Pack Description: This 84" x 52" Emergency Insulated Thermal Sleeping Blanket is an essential emergency or camping kit item. Mylar foil assists the body in heat retention during emergency situations. Can be used as a regular blanket in cold conditions while sleeping. It's also reusable and won't tear easily, allowing for multiple uses in different situations. Waterproof and windproof. Will not crack or shrink. It also reflects 90 percent of your body heat back to you, making it ideal for offsetting hypothermia reaction.

Not only can these be a life saver by providing warmth, but they can also be used as a ground cover, to build a shelter, collect rain water, and as a reflective signal device. Search Terms: mylar bags blankets emergency blanket survival gear kits equipment space blanket emergency heavy duty prepper supplies gear emergency kit blankets car supplies car kit roadside assistance for vehicles outdoor gear for men adults camping accessories Features: - Reflects up to 90% of your body heat back to you - 100% windproof and waterproof material - Will not crack or shrink - Measures 84" x 52": - Flexible in freezing temperatures === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Reflects 90 Body Heat, Waterproof And Windproof, Reusable, Won't Crack Or Shrink, Flexible In Freezing Temps

openai.title_differentiation: Reflects 90 Percent Body Heat, Waterproof And Windproof, Reusable, 84" X 52", Flexible In Freezing Temps
